submissions.bloq_code:
from qualtran.bloqs.basic_gates import XGate
bloq = XGate()
submissions.construction_method: Native XGate from qualtran.bloqs.basic_gates. Single-qubit bit-flip.

submissions.bloq_code:
from qualtran.bloqs.basic_gates import ZGate
bloq = ZGate()
submissions.construction_method: Native ZGate from qualtran.bloqs.basic_gates. Single-qubit phase-flip, diag(1,-1).

submissions.bloq_code:
from qualtran.bloqs.basic_gates import Hadamard
bloq = Hadamard()

from qualtran.bloqs.basic_gates import CNOT
bloq = CNOT()
submissions.construction_method: Native CNOT from qualtran.bloqs.basic_gates. Default: control=q0(MSB), target=q1.

submissions.bloq_code:
from qualtran.bloqs.basic_gates import TwoBitSwap
bloq = TwoBitSwap()
submissions.construction_method: Native TwoBitSwap from qualtran.bloqs.basic_gates. Swaps q0 and q1.

submissions.bloq_code:
from qualtran.bloqs.basic_gates import Toffoli
bloq = Toffoli()
submissions.construction_method: Native Toffoli from qualtran.bloqs.basic_gates. controls=q0,q1, target=q2.

submissions.bloq_code:
from qualtran.bloqs.qft.qft_text_book import QFTTextBook
bloq = QFTTextBook(bitsize=2)
submissions.construction_method: QFTTextBook(bitsize=2). Textbook QFT, raw matrix, no bit-reversal swaps.

submissions.bloq_code:
from qualtran.bloqs.qft.qft_text_book import QFTTextBook
bloq = QFTTextBook(bitsize=3)
submissions.construction_method: QFTTextBook(bitsize=3). Textbook QFT, raw matrix, no bit-reversal swaps.

submissions.bloq_code:
from qualtran.bloqs.basic_gates import SGate
bloq = SGate()
submissions.construction_method: Native SGate from qualtran.bloqs.basic_gates. Single-qubit phase gate, diag(1,i).

submissions.bloq_code:
from qualtran.bloqs.basic_gates import TGate
bloq = TGate()
submissions.construction_method: Native TGate from qualtran.bloqs.basic_gates. diag(1, exp(iπ/4)).

submissions.bloq_code:
from qualtran.bloqs.basic_gates import CZ
bloq = CZ()
submissions.construction_method: Native CZ from qualtran.bloqs.basic_gates. Symmetric controlled-Z, diag(1,1,1,-1).

submissions.bloq_code:
from qualtran.cirq_interop import CirqGateAsBloq
import cirq
bloq = CirqGateAsBloq(cirq.ISWAP)
submissions.construction_method: CirqGateAsBloq wrapping cirq.ISWAP. No native Qualtran iSWAP bloq; cirq interop provides the correct unitary.

submissions.bloq_code:
from qualtran.bloqs.basic_gates import SGate
bloq = SGate().controlled()
submissions.construction_method: SGate().controlled() — adds one control qubit to SGate. Control=q0(MSB), target=q1. diag(1,1,1,i).

submissions.bloq_code:
from qualtran.bloqs.basic_gates import CZ
bloq = CZ().controlled()
submissions.construction_method: CZ().controlled() — adds one control to CZ, yielding CCZ. diag(1,...,1,-1) on |111⟩.

submissions.bloq_code:
from qualtran.bloqs.qft.qft_text_book import QFTTextBook
bloq = QFTTextBook(bitsize=4)
submissions.construction_method: QFTTextBook(bitsize=4). Textbook QFT, raw matrix, no bit-reversal swaps.
